title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 86.123 - Method of financing
text:
86.123.  Method of financing. — All the assets of the retirement system shall be credited according to the purpose for which they are held to one of five funds; namely, the annuity savings fund, the annuity reserve fund, the pension accumulation fund, the pension reserve fund and the expense fund.
(RSMo 1939 § 9471) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 8913
